feature.name: Event Success
feature.description: Orchestrates the attendee Event Success Companion from route gating and arrival through live guidance, assignments, reveal, host-help requests, private feedback, opt-outs, and transition-triggered auto-launch.

actionScope.included: Companion data recovery, self-check-in and First Hello arrival actions, compatibility answers, assignment preferences, cue copy, host-help requests, and private event feedback.
excluded: Host setup, live-step control, assignment generation and overrides, reveal control, effect scheduling, and route auto-launch policy retain their host or launcher owners; the registered auto-launch state is evidence-only rather than a user action.

actions.description: Invalidates only the provider selected by the companion route's typed retry intent.
Confirms attendance once through location verification, after either direct check-in or a matching host QR scan.
Creates the viewer's location-verified First Hello mission once for the current event.
Completes the assigned First Hello mission once with the selected answer and verified location.
Skips First Hello by completing the shared self-check-in path for the current event.
Normalizes and persists one compatibility-questionnaire response for the current event and viewer.
actions.implementationNotes: EventSuccessController.saveCompatibilityResponse and the provider-free callback exist, but EventSuccessCompanionRouteScreen does not pass onSaveCompatibilityAnswers into EventSuccessCompanionScreen; production taps currently fall through to the no-op default.

actions.description: Persists whether the viewer is included in micro-pod assignments for this event.
Persists whether the viewer is included in guided rotations for this event.
Creates or replaces the viewer's private host-help request for one checked-in attendee.
Withdraws the viewer's active private host-help request for the event.
Creates or updates the viewer's private post-event feedback once for the current feedback version.
Copies one live or post-event conversation cue to the clipboard and confirms the copy in branded feedback.

evidenceExceptions.reason: These registered companion states have deterministic captures and Widgetbook evidence but no focused state-level automated test recorded by the screen authority yet.
Auto-launch is transition policy verified by the companion-launcher test rather than a stable standalone render state, so no deterministic capture or Widgetbook preview is registered.
